items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of 'Attribution links and conversion tracking windows', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these elements, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to attribution links or conversion tracking windows. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive status.
